No natural-data Continue surface was exercised.
TestFlight proof remains blocked until the uploaded bundle version matches committed source and Build Info shows clean matching commit/build/GitStatus.
recommended_next_reason: Retry only after creating/uploading/installing a TestFlight build whose bundle version matches committed project.pbxproj CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION.
